items.title: Why Choosing Australia Over Summer League Was a Good Move for Tyrese Proctor
items.author: Sports Illustrated

items.title: #Cavs have announced their 2026 NBA Summer League roster. Notably absent is Tyrese Proctor, who is set to play in FIBA Qualifiers with the Australian National Team beginning tomorrow.
items.author: Danny Cunningham
